"""Copy base model to checkpoints dir for baseline eval."""
import os
import shutil

src = '/data/base_model/Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct'
dst = 'checkpoints/base_model'

if os.path.exists(dst):
    print(f'{dst} already exists, skipping copy')
else:
    print(f'Creating symlink {dst} -> {src}')
    os.makedirs('checkpoints', exist_ok=True)
    os.symlink(src, dst)
    print('Done')
